source: BSData wh40k-10e catalog (cross-referenced against Wahapedia keyword list, verified 2026-03-10)
notes: The Captain is a standalone character datasheet (model entry type=model in BSData).
Rule infoLinks (Leader, Oath of Moment, Templar Vows) are directly on the Captain model entry.
Profile infoLinks (Finest Hour, Rites of Battle, Invulnerable Save 4+) are type=profile — not in expectedRules.
ADEPTUS ASTARTES keyword comes from 'Faction: Adeptus Astartes' category — same extraction gap as TYRANIDS.
The Captain has three distinct weapon loadouts; default loadout (Bolt pistol + Master-crafted Bolter
+ melee option) is used here. Extra loadout weapons will appear as 'extra weapons' — expected.
BS 2+ stat line reflects the character's 2+ Ballistic Skill.
pts=80 is on the Captain model entry directly.

knownDiscrepancies.note: Same systemic gap as TYRANIDS for Tyranid units: faction keyword derives from 'Faction: Adeptus Astartes' category. Confirms the gap is cross-faction.

Captain has multiple loadout options. Weapons from loadouts 2 and 3 (Heavy Bolt Pistol, Power Fist, Master-crafted Power Weapon, Plasma Pistol, Neo-volkite Pistol) will appear as extra weapons. This is expected pipeline behaviour for options-expansion.
